rows.cursor_owns: Runs the Cloud Agent, tools, and repo work in Cursor's environment.
rows.ham_owns: Does not execute the agent; proxies launch/follow-up/cancel when configured.

rows.cursor_owns: Status strings and conversation payloads returned by Cursor APIs.
rows.ham_owns: Persists ManagedMission JSON, checkpoint history, and bounded feed events (HAM-side view).

footnotes: Feed merge uses SDK bridge when enabled, else REST projection; see provider_projection on GET …/feed.
